title: campanopsis annularis
intro: Campanopsis annularis, also known as the annular bellflower or Campanopsis, is a plant species within the Campanulaceae family. It is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China and is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Campanopsis annularis is valued for its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, with its roots being used to treat coughs and bronchitis due to their expectorant properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Campanopsis annularis include decoctions and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues, including fever and sore throats.
